{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alsa Grayweather's sword
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Alsa Grayweather]] raised her [[sword]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We’re under attack!” Alsa Grayweather shouted, raising her sword.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
